text:
Fault: The engine speed exceeds its operational limit.
Action: Check fuel supply, ignition system, or engine governor to ensure it is operating correctly.
cause:

text:
Fault: High coolant temperature (123°C) suggests a possible blockage or malfunction in the cooling system.
Action: Inspect and clean the radiator, check for leaks, and verify proper oil levels to ensure efficient cooling.
cause:
Fault: High coolant temperature (123°C) suggests a possible blockage or malfunction in the cooling system.

text:
Fault: Over-speed condition detected by engine ECU.
Action: Check fuel supply, verify proper ignition timing, and ensure no mechanical issues are present.
cause:
Fault: Over-speed condition detected by engine ECU.
Action: Check fuel supply, verify proper ignition timing, and ensure no mechanical issues are present.

text:
Fault: High coolant temperature (118°C) suggests inadequate cooling system or blockage.
Action: Check coolant lines, valves, and filters; clean or replace if necessary.
cause:
Fault: High coolant temperature (118°C) suggests inadequate cooling system or blockage.
Action: Check coolant lines, valves, and filters; clean or replace if necessary.

text: Fault: Low engine oil pressure (32 kPa) detected at 2100 rpm, which is below baseline of 340 kPa. Recommended action: Check oil level and quality; consider adding lubricant or replacing if necessary.
cause: Fault: Low engine oil pressure (32 kPa) detected at 2100 rpm, which is below baseline of 340 kPa. Recommended action: Check oil level and quality; consider adding lubricant or replacing if necessary.
